# Vera's Roofing LLC

> Family-owned coastal North Carolina roofing contractor for homeowners, rental owners, and business property owners across Brunswick County, Wilmington, New Hanover County, and nearby coastal communities. License and insurance details are available on request.

## Canonical site

- Home: https://verasroofing.com/
- Services: https://verasroofing.com/services
- Gutter cleaning and guards: https://verasroofing.com/gutter-cleaning-guards
- Recent roof work: https://verasroofing.com/photos
- Service areas: https://verasroofing.com/areas
- Process: https://verasroofing.com/process
- Contact: https://verasroofing.com/contact
- Sitemap: https://verasroofing.com/sitemap.xml
- AI discovery: https://verasroofing.com/ai.txt
- Agent guidance: https://verasroofing.com/agents.txt

## Business summary

Vera's Roofing LLC is a family-owned roofing contractor focused on practical roof and gutter help for homes, rentals, and business properties in coastal North Carolina. The site emphasizes roof repair, roof replacement, leak concerns, hand-nailed shingle work when included in the agreed scope, CertainTeed ShingleMaster credentialed roofing company and roof-system planning questions, storm photos and condition checks, metal roofing, copper flashing, EPDM rubber membrane work for flat and low-slope roof areas, gutter cleaning, gutter guard installation, waterproofing details, roof preparation, material-planning questions, and owner-led final review.

## Contact

- Phone: 910.228.8034
- Email: verasroofing@gmail.com
- Preferred lead path: request a roof inspection or call/text with the town, property type, roof concern, gutter overflow, clogged gutters, or gutter guard questions. Photos are optional but helpful when they show the issue.

## Service area

Primary locations and regional language used on the site:

- Brunswick County, North Carolina
- Wilmington, North Carolina
- New Hanover County, North Carolina
- Nearby coastal NC communities
- Brunswick County examples listed on the public service-area page: Bald Head Island, Belville, Boiling Spring Lakes, Bolivia, Calabash, Carolina Shores, Caswell Beach, Holden Beach, Leland, Navassa, Northwest, Oak Island, Ocean Isle Beach, Sandy Creek, Shallotte, Southport, St. James, Sunset Beach, and Varnamtown.
- New Hanover County examples listed on the public service-area page: Wilmington, Carolina Beach, Kure Beach, Wrightsville Beach, Castle Hayne, Ogden, Porters Neck, Murraysville, Kings Grant, Masonboro, Myrtle Grove, Monkey Junction, Sea Breeze, Silver Lake, Wrightsboro, and Bayshore.

## Public fact notes

- This is a static, public business website for Vera's Roofing LLC.
- The site uses real Vera's Roofing job photos to help property owners compare roof details before they call or text.
- Vera's Roofing is described on the site as a CertainTeed ShingleMaster credentialed roofing company and can review CertainTeed shingle-system options before materials are ordered. Warranty availability is described conditionally because eligibility depends on the selected materials, full roof system, installation requirements, registration, property type, transfer rules, exclusions, and CertainTeed's written terms.
- FORTIFIED Home references are limited to program-requirements conversations when they apply; exam completion is not itself a blanket contractor certification or project designation. Any FORTIFIED designation depends on current program rules, eligible scope, documentation, evaluator verification, and project-specific review. Vera's Roofing does not promise a FORTIFIED designation or insurance benefit.
- For urgent roof concerns, pricing, scheduling, warranty, licensing, and project-specific questions, contact Vera's Roofing directly.
- The site does not promise insurance approvals, specific claim outcomes, fixed pricing, same-day response, or 24/7 availability.
